APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FINANCIAL PACIFIC LEASING, INC. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Nov-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF FINANCIAL PACIFIC LEASING, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued to November 16, 2015 to give Plainitff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 2, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)
